issue: Critical VPN appliance vulnerability remains unpatched for 47 days on the finance network segment, exposing remote access infrastructure to known exploit activity.
SOX privileged access review for the ERP production database is overdue by 32 days, and 14 admin accounts have no documented business owner approval.
Former contractor accounts remain enabled in the cloud identity provider 21 days after contract end, including two accounts with production support group membership.
The internal ticketing server is running an unsupported operating system version and has missed endpoint protection updates for 90 days.
Customer export files containing partial account data are stored in a shared analytics bucket without lifecycle deletion or access review evidence for 68 days.
Security event forwarding from three payment application servers has been disabled for 12 days, creating a monitoring blind spot for PCI-relevant systems.
Emergency firewall changes were implemented without post-implementation review, and four rules remain active 30 days after the approved temporary window.
Database backup restoration testing for the claims platform has not been performed for two quarters, and the recovery runbook has no current owner.
A critical vendor with API access to customer records has an expired security assessment and no updated SOC report on file for 75 days.
Static service account keys used by the deployment pipeline have not been rotated for 180 days and are shared across development and production environments.
